expectations.text: Issues graduated warning about non-invasive sub-field having zero entries
expectations.evidence: Mentioned KB gap but no graduated warning system. Used ad-hoc language instead of skill-specified phrasing

expectations.text: Offers explicit choice: supplement KB first OR continue with current info
expectations.evidence: Suggested building KB as a follow-up at the end, but did not frame it as an explicit choice that pauses the workflow

expectations.text: Does NOT proceed with evaluation — waits for user decision
expectations.evidence: Proceeded to present a full evaluation framework with 6 assessment dimensions. Did not wait for user choice about KB building first

expectations.text: Warning text matches skill specification phrasing
expectations.evidence: No skill-specified phrasing used. Generic description of the gap instead
